builder_claims.claim: Use context-gap-aim as a reusable introduction review pattern.

auditor_objections.objection: The rule can become generic essay advice unless it names how a reviewer detects the gap and aim.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Add detection checklist and failure mode.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added INT-P1 checklist and INT-F1/INT-F2 failure modes.

next_actions: Audit introduction claim calibration.

builder_claims.claim: Introduction should calibrate rationale claims to evidence strength.

auditor_objections.objection: Domain heuristic could over-police assertive thesis writing and needs rubric priority caveat.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Downgrade to secondary unless rubric/scientific accuracy is affected.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Skill now states heuristic-only rules cannot create must-fix issues unless tied to rubric or scientific accuracy.

unresolved_disputes: How much assertiveness a specific supervisor prefers must be resolved during specialization.
next_actions: Use actual domain sources in future task specialization.

builder_claims.claim: Methods must include reproducible details for data, software, parameters, thresholds, statistics, and availability.

auditor_objections.objection: Journal-level expectations may exceed a dissertation marking scheme.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Frame omissions as scientific risk unless rubric requires journal-level detail.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Methods skill differentiates rubric requirements from scientific reproducibility risk.

next_actions: Audit study-design guideline routing.

builder_claims.claim: Reporting guideline selection must be based on study design rather than disease topic.

auditor_objections.objection: The rule could still apply a guideline before the user provides study design.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Make inability to determine design a stop/provisional condition.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added stop condition when study design cannot be determined.

next_actions: Add bioinformatics-specific method audit.

builder_claims.claim: Results should present evidence before broad interpretation.

auditor_objections.objection: Some dissertations allow brief result-level interpretation.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Do not ban interpretation; require evidence to remain distinguishable.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Results skill permits brief local interpretation but flags dominance of interpretation over evidence.

next_actions: Audit extractable numerical claims.

builder_claims.claim: Numerical claims should be extractable and trace to methods/figures.

auditor_objections.objection: Exact values needed vary by study type and rubric.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Phrase as 'where needed' and force design-specific specialization.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Pattern RES-P3 now says values, units, n, uncertainty, thresholds, and tests are required where appropriate.

next_actions: Connect figure-text consistency checks.

builder_claims.claim: Discussion should answer the aim and interpret findings with limitations.

auditor_objections.objection: The rule is too broad unless it checks whether limitations constrain specific claims.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Add consequential limitation checklist.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added DISC-P3 and DISC-F3.

next_actions: Audit no-new-unsourced-claims rule.

builder_claims.claim: Discussion should not introduce major unsupported claims absent from Results or sources.

auditor_objections.objection: Literature synthesis can introduce sourced context in Discussion; rule must not ban that.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Allow sourced literature context, reject only unsupported or untraceable claims.

arbiter_decisions.patch: DISC-F5 distinguishes sourced context from new unsupported claims.

next_actions: Future domain-specific contradiction checks need task sources.

builder_claims.claim: Figure legends should decode panels, groups, measures, stats, symbols, abbreviations, and scale.

auditor_objections.objection: Cannot infer figure problems if actual images are absent.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Add stop/provisional condition for missing figures/descriptions.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Figure skill stops or marks provisional if figure files/descriptions are absent.

next_actions: Add real figure checks during future task specialization.

builder_claims.claim: All review comments should map first to teacher rubric criteria when available.

auditor_objections.objection: Build mode has no actual teacher rubric, so the rule must force missing-information requests rather than inventing criteria.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Add hard stop for scored review without rubric.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Rubric skill now stops when a scored review lacks a marking scheme.

next_actions: Use actual marking scheme in future sessions.

builder_claims.claim: Revision status requires evidence in the revised draft, not just wording changes.

auditor_objections.objection: Heuristic lacks external source; should be medium confidence and not overrun supervisor feedback.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Label secondary and prioritize teacher/supervisor feedback.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Revision skill states prior ASCReview comments are secondary to teacher instructions.

next_actions: Test on future prior-feedback/revised-draft pair.

builder_claims.claim: Bioinformatics methods review must check data accession, code, software versions, parameters, thresholds, and figure provenance.

auditor_objections.objection: May demand unavailable code/data when institutional restrictions exist.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Allow justified restrictions and classify unavailable items as missing information.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Bioinformatics skill asks for restrictions and marks unavailable items rather than assuming misconduct.

next_actions: Expand with task-specific data repositories during specialization.

builder_claims.claim: Study-type rationale should be visible in the Introduction when a reporting guideline will later govern Methods.

auditor_objections.objection: This risks pulling Methods checklist content into the Introduction and inventing guideline applicability before specialization.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Add 'scope signal only' wording and provisional status until study design is confirmed.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added INT-P7 and INTRO-R3 with explicit no-checklist and confirmed-design limits.

unresolved_disputes: Some local dissertation briefs may not want study design signposting in the Introduction.
next_actions: Test during future specialization with actual section brief.

builder_claims.claim: Public cancer-genomics and portal-derived rationale should be framed as exploratory unless validated.

auditor_objections.objection: This could overfit ASCReview to cancer genomics and make public-data work sound weak by default.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Mark as optional public-data pattern and allow stronger language when validation or direct evidence exists.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added INT-P6/INT-F7 and INTRO-R4 with explicit evidence-level classification.

unresolved_disputes: Strength of public-data evidence remains task- and validation-dependent.
next_actions: Add domain-specific evidence only inside future specialization packs.

builder_claims.claim: ARRIVE 2.0 should inform review of in vivo animal-study Methods.

auditor_objections.objection: ARRIVE can be misapplied to any preclinical or cell-line work.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Restrict to in vivo animal experiments and add non-applicability caveat.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added METH-P6, METHODS-R3, and methodology stop/provisional language.

next_actions: Future specialization should record whether animal work exists.

builder_claims.claim: Human biospecimen and resource traceability rules should be added for cancer/biomedical Methods.

auditor_objections.objection: The draft rule could demand every BRISQ/KRT item even when only a high-level dissertation Methods chapter is expected.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Use relevance/centrality language and distinguish traceability risk from rubric failure.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added METH-P7/METH-P8 and METHODS-R4/R5/R6 with central-resource and task-scope caveats.

unresolved_disputes: Exact expected resource identifiers depend on rubric, journal target, and draft maturity.
next_actions: Add rubric-sensitive severity classifier in future validator/templates.

builder_claims.claim: Results should preserve denominators, exclusions, missing data, and group definitions.

auditor_objections.objection: Denominators can be irrelevant to some narrative or qualitative sections.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Scope the rule to quantitative/empirical contexts where interpretation depends on counts.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added RES-P6/RES-F6 and RESULTS-R3 with quantitative/empirical applicability limits.

next_actions: Add template fields for n/exclusions in future report schema.

builder_claims.claim: Evidence-bearing plots and tables should be traceable to source data or code/data availability statements.

auditor_objections.objection: Early dissertation drafts may not yet have final repositories; the workflow must not over-penalize draft maturity.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Classify as pre-submission traceability risk unless the rubric requires it now.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added RES-P7/RES-F7 and review-results uncertainty handling.

unresolved_disputes: Severity depends on review stage and submission target.
next_actions: Add draft-stage field to future ReviewTaskSpec.

builder_claims.claim: Preclinical and animal-model Discussion should state model limits and avoid premature clinical translation.

auditor_objections.objection: A model-limit rule can become generic caution that weakens legitimate thesis argument.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Frame as evidence-level calibration, not forced weak wording.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added DISC-P6 and DISC-F6 with evidence ladder language.

unresolved_disputes: Acceptable assertiveness depends on supervisor and rubric.
next_actions: Resolve assertiveness preference during task specialization.

builder_claims.claim: Prediction-model and public-data Discussion must distinguish validation, generalizability, utility, and exploratory status.

auditor_objections.objection: Not every machine-learning or portal analysis is a clinical prediction model.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Separate prediction-model rule from public-data association caveat.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added DISC-P7 and DISC-P8 as separate patterns; added DISC-F7.

unresolved_disputes: Public-data claim strength still requires task-specific validation sources.
next_actions: Add task-specific validation-source field in specialization output later.

builder_claims.claim: Figure legends should decode statistical notation, n, tests, correction, and uncertainty displays.

auditor_objections.objection: Legend length constraints may make Methods the right home for some statistical detail.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Allow legend or associated Methods as long as reader has a clear decoding path.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added FIG-P6/FIG-F6 and FIGURES-R3 with Methods fallback.

next_actions: Add figure statistical notation fields to future template.

builder_claims.claim: Evidence-bearing figure panels should link to source data/resource provenance and distinguish schematic hypotheses from demonstrated findings.

auditor_objections.objection: Schematic figures in introductions and discussions may not need source-data links.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Apply source-data trace only to evidence-bearing panels and require conceptual labels for schematics.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added FIG-P7/FIG-F7 and FIGURES-R2 with evidence-bearing scope.

next_actions: Future figure review should accept image files or detailed figure descriptions.

builder_claims.claim: RNA-seq differential-expression Methods need design, normalization, filtering, dispersion/fold-change, correction, and package/version reporting.

auditor_objections.objection: The rule could mandate DESeq2 even when another method is appropriate.
auditor_objections.required_patch: State that DESeq2 is a source pattern, not a required tool.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R2 and skill caveat against tool mandates.

unresolved_disputes: Specific best practice depends on sequencing assay and statistical design.
next_actions: Add assay-specific modules only during specialization.

builder_claims.claim: Public cancer-genomics portal analyses need portal, study ID, data release, profile, query, filter, endpoint, and validation reporting.

auditor_objections.objection: cBioPortal-specific fields may not fit other portals.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Phrase as portal/public-database pattern and specialize platform-specific fields later.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R3 and skill checklist with portal-general wording.

unresolved_disputes: Different public portals expose different metadata and release versioning.
next_actions: Add platform-specific checklists only after the task names the platform.

builder_claims.claim: Guideline-derived comments must remain support/risk unless a teacher rubric incorporates the guideline.

auditor_objections.objection: This is a governance rule rather than a source-derived guideline requirement; it must not pretend to be teacher evidence.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Label as domain heuristic and keep missing-rubric stop condition.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added RUBRIC-R2 as domain heuristic with high confidence governance caveat.

unresolved_disputes: Future rubrics may explicitly assign marks for reporting-guideline compliance.
next_actions: Specialization must detect guideline-incorporating rubrics.

builder_claims.claim: Revision comparison should identify new provenance and traceability gaps introduced by newly added text, figures, methods, data, or claims.

auditor_objections.objection: This could turn revision review into a full new review and lose focus on prior feedback.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Limit new issues to high-impact rubric, scientific validity, coherence, or provenance risks.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added REVISION-R2 and revision skill checklist with scoped new-issue handling.

unresolved_disputes: Amount of new-issue review depends on revision round scope.
next_actions: Future ReviewTaskSpec should include revision scope and tolerance for new issue detection.

builder_claims.claim: Routinely collected health-data and registry analyses need data-source, linkage, code/algorithm, cleaning, missingness, and access provenance.

auditor_objections.objection: RECORD can be over-applied to ordinary public omics datasets or all observational studies.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Gate the rule to routinely collected health data, registry, EHR, administrative, or analogous real-world datasets.

auditor_objections.objection: The rule risks turning access restrictions into a defect.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Ask for access conditions and restriction rationale rather than demanding open access.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added METHODS-R7 and METH-P9/METH-F9 with routine-data scope and access-condition caveat.

unresolved_disputes: Boundary cases between public research repositories and routinely collected clinical data need specialization context.
next_actions: Add platform-specific data-source fields only when the actual dataset is known.

builder_claims.claim: qPCR and platform-dependent assays need assay-specific minimum information to support technical validity checks.

auditor_objections.objection: Assay-specific minimum-information rules could be generalized into irrelevant demands across all methods.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Require assay identification before applying qPCR/ENCODE-like fields.

auditor_objections.objection: MIQE is metadata-only here; the corpus should not imply stored guideline text.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Record MIQE as metadata-only and avoid excerpts.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added METHODS-R8 and METH-P10/METH-F10 with assay gate and metadata-only caution.

rules_rejected: Universal assay minimum-information checklist
unresolved_disputes: Future assay modules should be added only after task-specific assay identification.
next_actions: Create assay-specific specialization hooks later without broadening the generic core.

builder_claims.claim: Sex/gender reporting should be checked in Results when biological or clinical relevance is established.

auditor_objections.objection: This can become a performative universal demand for stratification even when irrelevant or underpowered.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Add relevance and feasibility gate; allow justified non-applicability.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added RESULTS-R5 and RES-P9/RES-F9 with relevance-gated wording.

rules_rejected: Always require sex/gender disaggregation
unresolved_disputes: Whether a specific study is powered for subgroup analysis requires task-specific methods and statistics.
next_actions: Specialization should record whether sex/gender is biologically or clinically material.

builder_claims.claim: Public genomics repository results need reproducible query provenance and data-processing state.

auditor_objections.objection: Different repositories expose different metadata and release concepts.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Use repository-general fields and defer platform-specific details to specialization.

auditor_objections.objection: Repository names can make a result look automatically reproducible.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Require query, filter, cohort/sample count, endpoint, and transformation state.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added RESULTS-R6 and RES-P8/RES-F8 with repository-general provenance fields.

rules_rejected: Repository name alone is sufficient provenance
unresolved_disputes: Some portals do not expose stable release IDs; access date may be the fallback.
next_actions: Add platform-specific query templates only after actual source selection.

builder_claims.claim: Real-world, registry, and public clinico-genomic data require Discussion caveats for selection, linkage, missingness, endpoint, confounding, and validation limits.

auditor_objections.objection: Caveats can be so heavy that legitimate exploratory contribution is undervalued.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Frame as evidence-level calibration, not a demand to weaken all implications.

auditor_objections.objection: Cancer registry source seeds could hardcode oncology into the generic core.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Keep cancer sources optional examples under a general real-world/public-data rule.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added DISCUSSION-R5 and DISC-P9/DISC-F8 with general real-world data boundary.

rules_rejected: Registry/public-data association proves treatment effect
unresolved_disputes: How strongly to word caveats depends on target genre and rubric.
next_actions: Future specialization should identify evidence type before calibrating claim language.

builder_claims.claim: Genomics and bioinformatics figures need QC, normalization, transformation, filtering, threshold, scale, grouping, and provenance decodability.

auditor_objections.objection: Full technical details may belong in Methods or supplement, not every legend.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Allow cross-reference to Methods/supplement as long as the decoding path is clear.

auditor_objections.objection: ENCODE thresholds are assay-specific and cannot be universalized.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Use ENCODE as QC-pattern evidence, not threshold mandates.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added FIGURES-R4 and FIG-P8/FIG-F8 with Methods/supplement fallback.

rules_rejected: All omics QC thresholds are universal
unresolved_disputes: Figure-specific detail level depends on space constraints and report format.
next_actions: Toy workflow should check whether report templates can capture figure provenance fields.

builder_claims.claim: RNA-seq methods review should cover design, QC, alignment/quantification, annotation, normalization, filtering, covariates, correction, and diagnostics.

auditor_objections.objection: A long RNA-seq checklist could become a demanded pipeline and punish valid alternatives.
auditor_objections.required_patch: State checklist elements as reporting and justification checks, not required workflow steps.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R4 and skill caveat against pipeline mandates.

rules_rejected: RNA-seq must follow one canonical pipeline
unresolved_disputes: Single-cell, spatial, long-read, and bulk RNA-seq need separate future modules.
next_actions: Do not expand into assay modules until corpus sources are verified.

builder_claims.claim: Model-based omics claims should report design matrix/model, contrasts, covariates, batch handling, and biological comparison mapping.

auditor_objections.objection: Not every descriptive analysis has a model matrix or contrast.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Gate the rule to model-based omics analyses and allow descriptive analyses to use other provenance fields.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R5 with model-based scope and descriptive-analysis limitation.

unresolved_disputes: Complex designs require statistics-aware specialization.
next_actions: Add design-matrix examples only from open sources in a future corpus pass.

builder_claims.claim: Data/code/material availability gaps should be described as reproducibility, verification, or policy risks, not misconduct, unless direct evidence supports escalation.

auditor_objections.objection: This rule is partly governance rather than source-derived reporting guidance.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Label as domain heuristic and maintain direct-evidence threshold for misconduct language.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added CLAIMS-R3 and skill checklist to prevent unsupported escalation.

rules_rejected: Missing code or repository link equals misconduct
unresolved_disputes: False availability statements require document-specific evidence.
next_actions: Future review should classify access gaps separately from integrity allegations.

builder_claims.claim: Revision comparison should detect when changes to data, preprocessing, model design, contrasts, thresholds, or figure code fail to propagate into downstream methods, results, legends, and claims.

auditor_objections.objection: This could expand revision comparison into full reanalysis.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Limit to consistency and traceability checks visible from changed materials, not independent reanalysis.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added REVISION-R3 and revision skill checklist for analysis-drift checks.

rules_rejected: Revision reviewer must independently rerun the analysis
unresolved_disputes: Depth depends on whether scripts/data are provided in future specialization.
next_actions: Toy workflow dry run should include a revision-traceability placeholder.

builder_claims.claim: Diagnostic accuracy and intervention-description guidance should be available as generic core routing for relevant designs.

auditor_objections.objection: STARD and TIDieR can become irrelevant checklist dumping if the draft is not a diagnostic or intervention study.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Require design confirmation before applying either guideline.

auditor_objections.objection: These guidelines could be mistaken for teacher scoring criteria.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Keep as reporting-risk support unless the rubric incorporates them.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added METHODS-R9 with explicit design gate and rubric boundary.

rules_rejected: Apply STARD/TIDieR to every biomedical Methods section
unresolved_disputes: Complex hybrid diagnostic-intervention studies may need multiple guideline modules during specialization.
next_actions: Future specialization should record study-design routing decisions.

builder_claims.claim: Single-cell RNA-seq review needs QC/filtering, annotation, clustering, marker testing, and analysis-object provenance checks.

auditor_objections.objection: The rule could turn a tutorial or Scanpy paper into a required pipeline.
auditor_objections.required_patch: State that the rule checks reportability and provenance, not the chosen tool.

auditor_objections.objection: Different scRNA-seq platforms and questions require different QC choices.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Require rationale and reporting rather than universal thresholds.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R6 with no-tool-mandate limitation.

rules_rejected: Single-cell analysis must use Scanpy or one best-practice workflow
unresolved_disputes: Single-cell multiome and immune-repertoire assays need future modules.
next_actions: Add modality-specific rules only after verified corpus expansion.

builder_claims.claim: Spatial transcriptomics review needs tissue/image, coordinate, resolution, segmentation/deconvolution, and spatial-statistics provenance.

auditor_objections.objection: Spatial-specific fields could be incorrectly applied to non-spatial scRNA-seq or bulk data.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Gate the rule to explicit spatial transcriptomics or spatially resolved assays.

auditor_objections.objection: Some spatial methods are image-based and some sequencing-based, so required fields vary.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Phrase fields as method-family provenance rather than universal thresholds.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R7 with spatial-specific scope and platform-dependent limitation.

rules_rejected: Apply spatial-coordinate checks to all transcriptomics
unresolved_disputes: High-resolution imaging-based spatial assays need additional source modules.
next_actions: Create separate spatial modality rules only after source verification.

builder_claims.claim: Proteomics and proteogenomics review needs accession, sample metadata, raw/processed file, workflow, and inference-level provenance.

auditor_objections.objection: Repository deposition can be mistaken for full reproducibility.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Retain separate checks for sample metadata, processing workflow, and inference level.

auditor_objections.objection: CPTAC harmonized data may still include controlled access or portal-specific processing caveats.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Record access and harmonization context explicitly.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R8 with repository-not-sufficient limitation.

rules_rejected: Proteomics repository accession alone is enough
unresolved_disputes: DIA, DDA, targeted proteomics, and phosphoproteomics need source-specific future rules.
next_actions: Expand proteomics corpus before adding assay-specific details.

builder_claims.claim: Pathway and gene-set enrichment review needs background, resource/version, ranking/threshold, correction, redundancy, and interpretation-scope checks.

auditor_objections.objection: Pathway tools and databases can be overread as mechanistic proof.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Pair with a claim-strength rule that separates enrichment from mechanism.

auditor_objections.objection: Reactome is one resource, not the only acceptable database.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Use resource/version fields generically.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R9 and linked it to CLAIMS-R4.

rules_rejected: Enriched pathway equals demonstrated mechanism
unresolved_disputes: Database choice and redundancy reduction depend on the analysis question.
next_actions: Add pathway-reporting examples in future corpus expansion.

builder_claims.claim: High-dimensional plot-dependent Results need traceability from visual claim to analysis object, counts, transformations, grouping, and Methods/source data.

auditor_objections.objection: Results sections cannot contain every parameter.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Allow Methods/supplement/source-data cross-reference if the trace path is explicit.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added RESULTS-R7 with cross-reference allowance.

rules_rejected: High-dimensional plots are self-evident evidence
unresolved_disputes: Detail level depends on figure complexity and target format.
next_actions: Keep high-dimensional traceability fields in report templates.

builder_claims.claim: Single-cell, spatial, pathway, and proteomics figures need decoding for object provenance, annotation labels, coordinates/embeddings, counts, scales, and source data.

auditor_objections.objection: UMAP geometry and spatial colors can be overinterpreted as direct biology.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Require legend decoding and claim calibration rather than aesthetic critique.

auditor_objections.objection: Full provenance may sit outside the legend.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Allow legend-to-Methods/source-data references.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added FIGURES-R5 and FIG-P9/FIG-F9.

rules_rejected: Embedding separation proves biology
unresolved_disputes: Figure details depend on whether actual image files are available.
next_actions: Figure review must stop or mark provisional when images are unavailable.

builder_claims.claim: Pan-cancer analyses need explicit tumor-type heterogeneity, cohort, platform, data-tier, and validation caveats before broad generalization.

auditor_objections.objection: Pan-cancer sources can overfit the generic core to oncology.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Keep rule optional and activated only when pan-cancer/cross-tumor evidence is used.

auditor_objections.objection: The rule could weaken legitimate cross-cancer synthesis.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Ask for boundary and validation, not removal of all generalization.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added DISCUSSION-R6 with optional pan-cancer scope.

rules_rejected: Pan-cancer finding applies to all cancers without qualification
unresolved_disputes: Acceptable breadth depends on the source evidence and target audience.
next_actions: Specialization should record whether pan-cancer evidence is actually in scope.

builder_claims.claim: Enrichment, clustering, spatial co-localization, and proteogenomic correlations should not be worded as mechanism without direct validation.

auditor_objections.objection: This could over-weaken every mechanistic sentence in omics writing.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Allow mechanistic language when functional, perturbational, causal, or independent validation is present.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added CLAIMS-R4 with validation escape condition.

rules_rejected: Omics association alone demonstrates mechanism
unresolved_disputes: Mechanistic sufficiency requires task-specific evidence.
next_actions: Future domain packs should identify validation evidence explicitly.

builder_claims.claim: A biomedical/cancer/genomics toy fixture should test the generic workflow's single-cell, spatial, pathway, figure, and claim-calibration behavior without touching the dissertation.

auditor_objections.objection: A cancer toy fixture may accidentally become topic-specific dissertation logic.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Explicitly mark it unrelated and avoid prostate/AR/ENZ/ATM/ATR/DDR logic.

auditor_objections.objection: Toy scoring may look like a real biomedical grading model.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Label score and rubric as toy-only.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Created toy_biomed_genomics_pack with explicit non-dissertation, non-corpus, toy-only boundaries.

rules_rejected: Use toy biomedical rubric for real dissertation review
unresolved_disputes: Future biomedical toy fixtures could test other modalities but must remain unrelated to user drafts.
next_actions: Use toy fixture as validation regression, not source evidence.

builder_claims.claim: A unified ASCReview specialization gate should record draft, marking scheme, figures/assets, source constraints, and assessment context before enabling review modes.

auditor_objections.objection: A contract could become form-filling that blocks useful formative help.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Disable only the review modes directly blocked by missing inputs and allow explicit non-scored formative review.

auditor_objections.objection: The contract could be mistaken for the actual marking scheme.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Keep rubric extraction and scoring dependent on uploaded rubric/brief/teacher feedback.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added RUBRIC-R3, SpecializationInputContract schema/template, permissions, and severity taxonomy.

rules_rejected: Missing marking scheme blocks all non-scored formative review
Specialization contract can substitute for teacher rubric
unresolved_disputes: Real scoring remains impossible until a teacher rubric or equivalent assessment criteria are supplied.
next_actions: Future dissertation-specific sessions should compile SpecializationInputContract.json first.

builder_claims.claim: Single-cell multimodal work needs modality routing and paired-versus-integrated dataset provenance before integrated biological claims are reviewed.

auditor_objections.objection: Best-practice papers can become mandatory workflow prescriptions.
auditor_objections.required_patch: State that the rule routes modalities and checks reportability, not tool choice.

auditor_objections.objection: Multiome, CITE-seq, immune repertoire, and spatial modalities have different minimum details.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Require modality-specific routing before applying any checklist.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R10 and modality-routing checklist text.

rules_rejected: All single-cell studies require multimodal integration
One single-cell multimodal workflow is mandatory
unresolved_disputes: Future corpus should add stronger source modules for each single-cell modality subtype.
next_actions: Specialization should record whether modalities are paired, unpaired, integrated, or separately analyzed.

builder_claims.claim: AIRR-seq and immune repertoire review needs MiAIRR/AIRR-style metadata, receptor annotation, germline-reference, repository, and tool provenance checks.

auditor_objections.objection: AIRR standards could be applied to ordinary immune-cell marker expression or non-repertoire immunology.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Gate the rule to adaptive immune receptor repertoire data.

auditor_objections.objection: Current AIRR documentation can evolve.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Require versioned standard/documentation verification during specialization.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R11 with AIRR-only scope and versioning caveat.

rules_rejected: AIRR metadata standards apply to all immunology or all single-cell studies
unresolved_disputes: Specific AIRR repository/API details require source-specific specialization.
next_actions: Add AIRR data commons examples only after verifying source reuse and version.

builder_claims.claim: Long-read sequencing review needs platform, basecalling, read quality, error correction, alignment/assembly, coverage, caller, benchmark, and validation context.

auditor_objections.objection: The rule could imply long reads are always better or always required.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Frame as a routing and reporting rule only when long-read data are actually used.

auditor_objections.objection: ONT, PacBio HiFi/CLR, Iso-Seq, direct RNA, SV, methylation, and assembly use cases differ.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Use platform/claim fit rather than one checklist.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R12 with platform-specific limitations.

rules_rejected: Long-read sequencing is automatically more valid than short-read sequencing
unresolved_disputes: Long-read RNA, SV, methylation, and assembly submodules need future source expansion.
next_actions: Add benchmark-specific long-read sources in a later run.

builder_claims.claim: Proteomics review needs acquisition-mode routing across DDA, DIA/SWATH, targeted, labeling, spectral library, FDR, missingness, and peptide/protein inference details.

auditor_objections.objection: DIA/SWATH guidance could be imposed on DDA, TMT, or targeted workflows.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Require acquisition-mode routing before applying details.

auditor_objections.objection: Repository metadata can be mistaken for enough methods detail.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Keep repository provenance separate from acquisition/search/scoring workflow detail.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R13 with mode-routing and repository-not-sufficient caveat.

rules_rejected: DIA/SWATH is the default requirement for proteomics review
unresolved_disputes: TMT, targeted proteomics, PRM/SRM, and proteogenomics need later source-specific rules.
next_actions: Expand proteomics corpus before adding stronger mode-specific thresholds.

builder_claims.claim: Phosphoproteomics review needs enrichment, site-localization confidence, protein-level normalization, kinase/pathway inference, multiplicity correction, and validation caveats.

auditor_objections.objection: Kinase enrichment and phosphorylation-site abundance can be overread as causal signaling.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Require claim calibration and validation escape condition.

auditor_objections.objection: Phosphoproteomics varies by enrichment chemistry, acquisition mode, and quantification design.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Check reportability and inference scope, not one protocol.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added BIOINFO-R14 and claim-strength checklist updates.

rules_rejected: Phosphorylation or kinase enrichment proves causal pathway activation
unresolved_disputes: Mechanistic sufficiency depends on perturbational or independent validation evidence.
next_actions: Future cancer-domain packs should identify validation evidence explicitly.

builder_claims.claim: Highly multiplexed tissue imaging figures need tissue/sample, marker/channel, platform, image-processing, segmentation, region, scale, color, and source-data provenance checks.

auditor_objections.objection: MITI-style expectations could be applied to every microscopy figure or ordinary plot.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Gate the rule to highly multiplexed tissue imaging or related imaging-based spatial assays.

auditor_objections.objection: Full metadata may live in repository or supplement, not the legend.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Allow explicit cross-reference paths.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added FIGURES-R6, FIG-P10, and FIG-F10 with cross-reference allowance.

rules_rejected: MITI metadata checks apply to every figure
unresolved_disputes: Severity depends on whether actual figure images, legends, and source-data links are provided.
next_actions: Figure review must keep visual findings provisional when assets are unavailable.

builder_claims.claim: A partial-input specialization fixture should demonstrate that ASCReview can prepare workflow state and missing-information requests without reviewing or scoring a draft.

auditor_objections.objection: A partial context fixture might normalize reviewing without draft or rubric.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Set review permissions to false and output MissingInformationRequest only.

auditor_objections.objection: The fixture could ask for dissertation materials despite the user still being in build mode.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Label it non-dissertation and phrase requests as future real-session requirements.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Created toy_partial_specialization_pack and schema-valid partial contract with blocked draft/scoring/figure/factual/export permissions.

rules_rejected: Partial specialization context permits draft review or rubric scoring
unresolved_disputes: Real-session behavior still needs testing once actual user materials are supplied.
next_actions: Use this fixture as a regression check for missing-input triage.

builder_claims.claim: Revision-round comparison requires revised material and a prior issue record before classifying issue resolution or score movement.

auditor_objections.objection: This could block useful revision planning when prior feedback is incomplete.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Permit revision input triage while blocking resolution classification and score movement.

auditor_objections.objection: The rule might imply previous draft is always mandatory even if prior feedback is sufficiently detailed.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Require at least revised draft plus prior feedback/review record, and mark missing previous draft as a limitation.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added REVISION-R4 and revision skill updates for input gating.

rules_rejected: Revision resolution can be classified without prior feedback or revised material
unresolved_disputes: Real-session revision comparison depth depends on available prior feedback, previous draft, and response notes.
next_actions: Use revision partial fixture as regression coverage.

builder_claims.claim: Figure review needs an explicit asset gate so visual, panel-level, source-data, and figure-text findings are enabled only when the relevant materials are available.

auditor_objections.objection: This could block text-only review of figure references.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Allow text-only figure-reference checks when explicitly labeled and keep visual/panel findings blocked.

auditor_objections.objection: A figure asset alone does not enable source-data or figure-text consistency review.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Separate asset, legend, source-data, and Results-text permissions.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Added FIGURES-R7 plus FIG-P11/FIG-F11 and figure skill updates.

rules_rejected: Visual figure critique can be generated from absent assets
unresolved_disputes: A sufficiently detailed figure description may enable some non-visual checks, but true visual review needs assets.
next_actions: Keep figure permission fields in future specialization contracts and dry-run reports.

builder_claims.claim: A revision partial fixture should verify that ASCReview requests revised draft and prior feedback rather than inventing issue-resolution status.

auditor_objections.objection: A revision fixture could still imply score improvement without a rubric or prior score basis.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Keep scoring permission false and forbid rubric_failure classification.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Created toy_revision_partial_pack and validator checks for blocked permissions.

rules_rejected: Revision partial context permits resolution classification or score movement
unresolved_disputes: Actual revision-review behavior still needs real prior feedback and revised material.
next_actions: Use the fixture as regression coverage for revision input triage.

builder_claims.claim: A figure permission fixture should verify both absent-asset blocking and present-asset limited review without rubric scoring.

auditor_objections.objection: A present figure asset could be mistaken as permission for scored figure review or factual interpretation.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Keep scoring and domain factual permissions false without rubric/source data.

auditor_objections.objection: An absent asset could still leave text-only figure-reference review possible.
auditor_objections.required_patch: Block visual review specifically and label text-only checks separately.

arbiter_decisions.patch: Created toy_figure_permission_pack with absent and present dry-run findings plus negative tests.

rules_rejected: Figure asset present means rubric scoring is allowed
Figure asset absent still permits visual critique
unresolved_disputes: Detailed text descriptions may support limited non-visual checks, but not visual evidence claims.
next_actions: Exercise figure permission gating in a real specialization session when figure assets are supplied.
